name: Fas Qlas
overview: In a comedy context, the series revolves around only two brothers from the father, (Taleb) and (Abdulsalam), each of whom lived his childhood away from the other to be an independent and different personality, and after years they meet by chance and have to live together, will each of them be able to adapt to the other?

trailers.title: مسلسل فص كلاص - الحلقة 1 - تعارف - عبدالناصر درويش و حسن البلام
